title: Define theme types and theme cycle order
description: Create TypeScript types and constants for the 5-way theme system. Theme IDs: daylight, dusk, nighttime, morning. Cycle order is fixed.
acceptanceCriteria: THEME_CYCLE constant array defines order: daylight → dusk → nighttime → morning
Helper getNextTheme(current) returns next theme in cycle
Unit test verifies cycle wraps (morning → daylight)

steps.details: Create lib/src/lib/theme.ts. Export type ThemeId = 'daylight' | 'dusk' | 'nighttime' | 'morning'. Export const THEME_CYCLE: ThemeId[] = ['daylight','dusk','nighttime','morning'].
Export function getNextTheme(current: ThemeId): ThemeId. Find index of current in THEME_CYCLE, return next; if last, return first.
Create lib/src/lib/theme.test.ts. Test getNextTheme cycles correctly and morning → daylight.

technicalNotes: Use existing Vitest setup in lib
